ocr_findings.description: OCR header reads 'コレが出る！' but image shows 'コシが出る！' (mascot branding text — cosmetic mascot name variant, no content loss)

reviewer_notes: Page is a 過去問＆完全解説 exam-question spread with 5 numbered questions (3-9 through 3-13), each with 4-choice ア/イ/ウ/エ answers. Answer key line at bottom (問題3-9 ア … 問題3-13 イ) is fully preserved in OCR. All question stems, choices, and answer letters are faithfully reproduced. Page footer '118' visible in image matches pipeline page_134 internal numbering offset.
